scenarios.name: baseline — swap + lending + transfer + perp-short widgets render

expected.notes: No execution; assert all four legs (swap, lending, transfer, perp-short) mount per the architecture-v2 carry-staked-basis 4-leg flow.
LST acquisition leg — mock routes the STAKE proxy through the swap widget (stable → weETH).

scenarios.name: leg 2 — PLEDGE: LEND 10 weETH on Aave as collateral

expected.notes: Pledge leg — LST deposited on Aave as collateral, emitting a LEND row on the mock ledger. Completes architecture-v2 step 2 of 4.

scenarios.name: leg 3 — BORROW 15000 USDC against weETH collateral

expected.notes: Borrow leg — stable borrowed against LST collateral to fund perp margin. Emits a BORROW row.
Perp-short leg — delta-hedges the LST spot long. Completes architecture-v2 step 4 of 4.

scenarios.name: slippage tolerance change re-renders expected-output (no order)

expected.notes: Reactive-only scenario — no order placed. Tightening slippage recomputes the route memo.
